prompt:
Generate one valid molecule that satisfies all constraints below.
- Connectivity: exactly 1 connected component (single connected molecule).
- Number of F atoms: exactly 1.
- Number of Cl atoms: exactly 1.
- Number of Br atoms: exactly 1.
- Shortest path between F and Cl: exactly 6 bonds (count all bonds on the path, including the bond to each halogen).
- Shortest path between F and Br: exactly 10 bonds (count all bonds on the path, including the bond to each halogen).
- Shortest path between Cl and Br: exactly 10 bonds (count all bonds on the path, including the bond to each halogen).
- Number of rings: exactly 0.
Return only the molecule in the requested output format.
response_contract: Return only a valid JSON object in MolJSON format. No markdown, no code fences, no comments, no surrounding prose. Use the MolJSON keys atoms, bonds, charges, and aromatic_n_h.
